task_completion.description: Open the input unsafe_composite.tif image in Fiji
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji GUI showing an image window titled 'unsafe_composite.tif' with a Red and Green composite image.

task_completion.description: Change Channel 1 color from Red to Magenta
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image visually changes to Magenta and Green. The Channels tool or LUT menu may be visible showing Channel 1 set to Magenta.

task_completion.description: Convert the composite image to a flattened RGB image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Image > Type > RGB Color menu is selected, or the image window title updates to indicate '(RGB)' mode instead of a composite.

task_completion.description: Save the Magenta/Green RGB image as accessible_composite.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or Fiji status bar confirming the image is being saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/figures/accessible_composite.png'.

task_completion.description: Generate a Deuteranopia simulation of the figure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Simulate Color Blindness' dialog is visible with 'Deuteranopia' selected, or a new image window appears showing the simulated colors (often with 'Deuteranopia' in the title).

task_completion.description: Save the Deuteranopia simulation image as deuteranopia_proof.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or Fiji status bar confirming the simulated image is being saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/figures/deuteranopia_proof.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the image manipulations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Fiji application windows, menus, and dialogs rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the image colors and converted to RGB
integrity.visual_evidence: The image is visibly seen changing from Red/Green to Magenta/Green, and then to the simulated colorblindness view within the Fiji interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use command-line tools like ImageMagick to bypass Fiji
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'convert' or Python scripts executing the image processing steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires converting a Red/Green composite image to a Magenta/Green composite, a recognized accessibility technique for Deuteranopia. Channel 1 (Red) must be changed to Magenta, while Channel 2 remains Green. The image must be converted to a flattened RGB image (Image > Type > RGB Color) before saving as 'accessible_composite.png'. A Deuteranopia simulation must be generated (Fiji has a built-in 'Simulate Color Blindness' feature under Image > Color > Simulate Color Blindness) and saved as 'deuteranopia_proof.png'.
